Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Marine Engineering And Supply Company
Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Chris Hersom Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, George Foster.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Marine Engineering and Supply Company.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Economic Damages in the amount of $144,500.00.
Non-Economic Damages in the amount of $1,260,000.00.
Total Judgment in the amount of $1,404,500.00.
Judgment submitted/signed in court.
